name: Ribbed Soap Pump Tan - Room Essentials™
description:
Finish off the look of your bath space with an artful effect by adding the Ribbed Soap Pump from Room Essentials™. This tan soap pump features an allover ribbed design for a classic look that complements your existing decor well. Made of plastic with an easy-to-press lid, this BPA-free soap pump is compatible with lotion, dish and gel soaps. You can use it alone or add a coordinating ribbed tray to complete the look.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
